zh.description: 造成物伤，若生命高于50%，使用后自己获得双攻-50%。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. If user's HP ratio is higher than 50%, user gains Attack -50% after use.

move_stones.name: Otherworldly Hand

zh.name: 彼岸之手
zh.description: 造成物伤，自己每失去10%生命，本技能能耗-1。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. For every 10% HP lost by the user, this move's energy cost -1.

move_stones.name: Persecution

zh.name: 迫害
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Plunder

zh.name: 掠夺
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Dirty Trick

zh.name: 黑手
zh.description: 造成魔伤，2连击。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage, 2 Combo.

move_stones.name: Frame-Up

zh.name: 栽赃
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Drop

zh.name: 跌落
zh.description: 造成大量物伤，自己获得物攻-50%，应对状态：改为获得物攻+50%。

move_stones.description: Deals huge physical damage. User gains Physical Attack -50%. Counter Status: user gains Physical Attack +50% instead.

move_stones.name: Spatial Pressure

zh.name: 空间压迫
zh.description: 造成物伤，敌方获得1层星陨。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage. Opponent gains 1 stack of Starfall Mark.

move_stones.name: Collapse

zh.name: 坍缩
zh.description: 造成魔伤，若击败敌方，自己获得魔攻+50%。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage. If this move defeats the opponent, user gains Magic Attack +50%.

move_stones.name: Tetra Degradation

zh.name: 四维降解
zh.description: 造成魔伤，敌方每有1层印记，本技能能耗-1。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage. For each stack of opponent's Marks, this move's energy cost -1.

move_stones.name: Multi-dimensional Strike

zh.name: 多维击打
zh.description: 造成魔伤，1连击，敌方每有1层星陨，本次技能连击数+1。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage, 1 Combo. For each Starfall Mark stack on the opponent, this move's Combo count +1.

move_stones.name: Confusion

zh.name: 错乱
zh.description: 造成魔伤，应对状态：敌方获得3层星陨。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage. Counter Status: opponent gains 3 stacks of Starfall Mark.

move_stones.name: Particle Collision

zh.name: 粒子对撞
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Binary Stars

zh.name: 双星
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成物理伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals physical damage to the opponent.

move_stones.name: Big Bang

zh.name: 大爆炸
zh.description: 对敌方精灵造成魔法伤害。

move_stones.description: Deals magic damage to the opponent.

world_profile.introduction: 心中怀揣着对魔法的强烈渴望和对广阔知识世界的向往，呱呱从玄玉岛来到魔法学院。咒语对它们来说就像绕口令，因此需要花费更多的时间来学习，在魔法学院的走廊，经常能看到它们带着歪歪扭扭的自学笔记飞奔的身影。
